subcodes.title: Words to Miss Boylan, spoken around 1911-08-25
subcodes.first_line: ‘Abdu'l-Bahá said that he had fulfilled that prophecy by building the Tomb of the Báb. He said, "The blessed and holy Tomb (of Baha'u'llah, May my soul be a sacrifice to its dust!) and the Tomb of the Bab on Mount Carmel was the first Mashraq'ul-Azkar…"
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @Shrines and Holy places
